bills.title: Directs utility corporations to petition the public service commission for approval of electric grid utilization metrics
bills.summary: Directs utility corporations to petition the public service commission for approval of electric grid utilization metrics; directs the public service commission to determine which electric grid utilization metrics shall be approved and how such metrics shall be applied; directs the public service com

bills.title: Authorizes the city of Glen Cove to impose a hotel and motel tax
bills.summary: Authorizes a hotel and motel tax in the city of Glen Cove, in the county of Nassau, at a rate of four percent.

bills.title: Relates to the compensation, benefits and other terms and conditions of employment of certain state officers and employees; repealer
bills.summary: Relates to the compensation, benefits and other terms and conditions of employment of certain state officers and employees; implements the agreements between the state and the public employees federation.

bills.title: Adds the Harriet Tubman Underground Railroad scenic byway into the state scenic byways system
bills.summary: Adds the Harriet Tubman Underground Railroad scenic byway into the state scenic byways system.

bills.title: LEGISLATURE AND JUDICIARY BUDGET
bills.summary: Makes appropriations for the support of government - Legislature and Judiciary Budget.

bills.title: DEBT SERVICE FUND--GENERAL DEBT SERVICE FUND
bills.summary: Makes appropriations for the support of government - State Debt Budget.
